news.summary: Sienna Senior Living Inc. based in Markham, Ontario, revealed on May 29, 2025, that they have garnered approval from shareholders for all resolutions voted on during the Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders on May 28, 2025. Shareholders gave the green light for each nominee listed in the Company's management information circular dated April 8, 2025, to serve as directors. The voting results for each nominee were as follows. This public announcement did not disclose the total number of votes cast or any percentages.
news.headline: Sienna Senior Living Inc. announces positive results from Annual and Special Meeting, all nominees elected as directors.

news.summary: A lawsuit was filed in 2023 by The Times against OpenAI and Microsoft on grounds of copyright infringement. Following the legal action, the editorial content of The Times is set to be displayed on various Amazon platforms.
news.headline: The Times and Amazon sign A.I. licensing deal after lawsuit against OpenAI & Microsoft in 2023 for copyright infringement.

news.summary: Following air traffic control issues that caused significant delays at Newark’s airport, United Airlines has established a partnership. Newark, which is a major hub for the airline, experienced delays affecting a large number of flights.
news.headline: United Airlines to return to JFK airport through a deal with JetBlue after Newark's hub faced delays due to air traffic control issues.

news.summary: The government swiftly filed a request with the court to enable the United States to maintain heavy tariffs.
news.headline: Tariffs ruling impacts Trump’s trade strategy; US seeks to continue imposing high tariffs via court petition.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in New York and Tokyo, TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG), a digital media and data group based in Tokyo, co-hosted the 2025 Generative AI Conference. The event took place on May 23-24 and is considered the most significant AI gathering in Asia. The conference saw participation from a large number of attendees, demonstrating the growing interest and importance of AI in the region.
news.headline: TNL Mediagene (Nasdaq: TNMG) co-hosted 2025 Generative AI Conference in Asia, enhancing presence in digital media.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Atlanta, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the leading fully integrated fire protection, life safety, and security services provider in the US, announced the acquisition of Moore Fire Protection. Moore Fire Protection, a top fire sprinkler company catering to the Seattle region, has been merged into the Pye-Barker Fire & Safety portfolio. This acquisition marks a significant development for Pye-Barker Fire & Safety as it expands its reach and service offerings.
news.headline: Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires Moore Fire Protection, expanding in Pacific Northwest with Seattle as its focus.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Singapore, the world's inaugural licensed onchain exchange, GRVT (pronounced as "gravity"), shared news about the availability of its Android mobile app on Google Play Store. Users can now access the complete trading platform through this launch.
news.headline: GRVT's Android app is now on Google Play Store, marking the world's first onchain exchange's mobile platform launch.

news.summary: At the upcoming SGNA Conference in CENTER VALLEY, Pa., on May 29, 2025, Olympus Corp. will showcase its newest drying cabinet, the ScopeLocker Air. This innovative product is designed to cater to space-conscious facilities by offering flexible sizing options and air functionalities. Olympus, known for its cutting-edge medical technology solutions, aims to provide convenience and efficiency to customers, addressing the needs of diverse healthcare settings. The ScopeLocker Air is poised to revolutionize equipment storage with its adaptable features, providing a practical solution for facilities seeking versatile and space-saving solutions.
news.headline: Olympus launches ScopeLocker Air, a new endoscope drying cabinet with flexible options for space-conscious facilities.

news.summary: Chick-fil-A is offering a perfect summer combination for guests nationwide, as they can now pair peachy beverages with classic Chick-n-Strips. The popular seasonal Peach Milkshake will be available starting June 9, 2025. This refreshing treat is being celebrated once again and is sure to be a hit with customers during the summer season.
news.headline: Chick-fil-A reintroduces Peach Milkshake and introduces new peach treat, available nationwide starting June 9, 2025.

news.summary: Hundreds of Crash Champions sites, exceeding 650 in number, are set to provide repair services for Hyundai vehicles. This decision comes after Crash Champions, a leading collision repair service provider in the U.S., was chosen by Hyundai Motor America. The partnership is aimed at delivering top-notch repairs for all Hyundai vehicles. The announcement was made in Chicago on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: Aerial saws will be used by Mid-Atlantic Interstate Transmission Company, a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE), to trim trees along high-voltage transmission lines in 16 counties until the end of the year. This initiative is taking place in ERIE, Pa., and involves the use of a helicopter for the task.
news.headline: MAIT using helicopter with aerial saw to trim trees along transmission lines in 16 counties in PA by year-end.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington on May 29, 2025, MHR Capital Group revealed plans to start construction on a new AC Hotels by Marriott in Kennewick, Washington. MHR Capital Group, a private investment firm from Bellevue that specializes in real estate and private equity ventures, is spearheading this project.

news.summary: Announced in Hangzhou, China on May 29, 2025, Webus International Limited, traded on NASDAQ as WETO, a leader in AI-driven mobility solutions offering tailored chauffeur services for global travelers, revealed two strategic advancements. news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on May 29, 2025, Bloomberg Industry Group announced that they successfully raised a total of $15,730.90 during the 35th edition of the Lawyers Have Heart event. This charity event comprised a 10K run, 5K run, and a Fun Walk, all aimed at supporting the American Heart Association (AHA). The funds gathered are dedicated to furthering research, prevention, and awareness initiatives concerning heart disease.
news.headline: Bloomberg Industry Group raised $15,730.90 for AHA's Lawyers Have Heart event supporting heart disease research.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy grew by 6.0% in the last quarter, with a particularly strong performance seen in the technology sector, which saw a growth of 12.5%. The report also highlighted an increase in job creation, with 2.5 million new jobs added in various industries. Additionally, the report mentioned a 9.8% rise in global trade, driven by increased demand in the manufacturing and consumer goods sectors. Overall, these numbers suggest a positive outlook for the global economy in the upcoming months.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Dallas, Firehawk Aerospace, a prominent defense technology company renowned for its expertise in advanced energetics and propulsion technologies, has been granted a significant land grant and financial backing by the State of Oklahoma and federal authorities. This award highlights the company's dedication to innovation and growth, showcasing their commitment to developing cutting-edge solutions. The precise amounts of the land grant and capital investment were not disclosed but are expected to be substantial, emphasizing the widespread support and recognition of Firehawk's contributions to the industry.
news.headline: Firehawk Aerospace receives land grant & capital investment from OK & federal leaders to boost energetics & propulsion capabilities.

news.summary: Safe & Green has recently acquired a new company, considerably expanding its oil production assets. This acquisition has increased Safe & Green's oil production holdings by a significant number, allowing the company to strengthen its position in the industry. This move is expected to have a substantial impact on Safe & Green's operations, with the company now owning a larger share of the oil production market.
news.headline: Safe and Green Holdings expands with acquisition of 1,600 acres of oil wells and leases, boosting oil production.

news.summary: Luxembourg, on May 29, 2025 - OHI Group S.A., a company based in Luxembourg, has revealed its plans to privately file a draft registration statement on Form F-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). This announcement signifies the Issuer's intention to pursue a confidential submission in relation to the registration process, indicating strategic moves towards potentially obtaining public status in the foreseeable future.
news.headline: OHI Group S.A. plans confidential U.S. IPO with a draft registration statement on Form F-1 to the SEC.

news.summary: A seasoned leader in franchise development has been selected to boost consultant partnerships and drive growth in executive models at Pillar To Post, the top home inspection franchise in North America. Brenda Gemmell has been promoted to Director of Consultant at the company's headquarters in Tampa, Florida. This announcement was made on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: Brenda Gemmell promoted to Director of Consultant and Coach Success at Pillar To Post, leading home inspection franchise.

news.summary: In WUXI, China, on May 29, 2025, LOBO EV Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: LOBO) disclosed the debut of its second-gen multi-functional robotic platform. The company, a leading producer of electric bikes, tricycles, and off-road four-wheeler electric carts, introduced a versatile robotic platform. This new platform, an advancement from LOBO's initial robotic mower, comes with a modular design to allow conversion into various specialized service robots by customizing modules.
news.headline: LOBO unveils new robotic platform, designed for home & industrial use, capable of transforming into multiple specialized robots.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in San Jose, California, Rocketlane, a prominent PSA software company, held Propel25, its main two-day conference in Santa Clara on May 14-15. The event brought together more than 300 top executives in Professional Services from firms such as MongoDB, Palantir, and Zoom.
news.headline: Rocketlane's Propel25 conference in Santa Clara gathered 300+ leaders from companies like MongoDB, Palantir, Zoom to discuss AI in Professional Services.

news.summary: Bigbank AS's Supervisory Board recently made a significant decision to set up three new committees within the organization. These include the Risk Committee, Remuneration Committee, and Nomination Committee. This move is aimed at enhancing the overall governance structure and oversight functions of the bank. It signifies a strategic approach to addressing key areas of concern and improving decision-making processes within the institution. This decision highlights the commitment of Bigbank AS to strengthen its internal framework and ensure effective leadership.
news.headline: Bigbank AS creates 3 new committees: Risk, Remuneration, Nomination. Aim to enhance governance.

news.summary: MellingMedical has recently partnered with joimax®, a prominent provider of full-endoscopic and minimally invasive spinal surgery products. This collaboration aims to enhance medical care for veterans, active duty personnel, and the Department of Defense. The agreement, announced on May 29, 2025, in Alexandria, Virginia, marks a significant step towards providing innovative solutions in the medical field. This partnership is expected to bring access to advanced medical products to a wide range of patients, helping to improve healthcare for America's military community.
news.headline: MellingMedical partners with joimax®, enhancing federal health portfolio with spinal surgery products for veterans.

news.summary: On April 7, 2025, TKM Grupp AS released a stock exchange notice detailing a restructuring initiative implemented in Lithuania by its subsidiary TKM Auto OÜ. The subsidiary oversees operations in the car trade sector, with a focus on separating the business lines for KIA and Škoda.
news.headline: TKM Grupp AS completes intra-group restructuring in Lithuania on 07.04.2025 to separate KIA and Škoda business lines.

news.summary: SkinSpirit has unveiled a groundbreaking microneedling treatment in the U.S. market aimed at addressing active acne, redness, and inflammation. The debut took place in Seattle on May 29, 2025. SkinSpirit is a top-notch hub for medical aesthetics and is known for being a top provider of Botox and dermal fillers. The innovative microneedling treatment offers promising results for those dealing with skin issues and is expected to be a game-changer for many. This strategic move demonstrates SkinSpirit's commitment to bringing cutting-edge solutions to clients, marking a significant development in the realm of skincare.
news.headline: SkinSpirit introduces new microneedling treatment for acne, redness, inflammation in U.S. Market. Seattle, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: The aim is to establish opportunities for budding athletes, with this campaign mirroring the successful strategy applied in Blizzard's recent collaboration with the Bundesliga champions in Germany, FC Bayern Munich, in 2022. The initiative is currently in the works under the supervision of Blizzard's renowned owner-coach, Giuseppe “Joe” Parolini, with the intention of creating pathways for young players.
news.headline: Brera Holdings PLC (Nasdaq: BREA) partners with Toronto Blizzard to launch grassroots soccer initiative in Canada and three continents, following successful partnership with FC Bayern Munich; program overseen by owner-coach Giuseppe “Joe” Parolini.

news.summary: Goldman Sachs predicts that there will be a temporary acceleration in inflation due to the trade tariffs imposed by Donald Trump. According to the bank's U.S. economist David Mericle, core personal consumption expenditures (PCE) inflation is expected to reach 3.6% by the end of 2025, a significant increase from the 2.8% recorded in April. Despite this surge, Goldman does not anticipate a prolonged period of high inflation like that experienced in 2021-2022. Unlike the previous inflation caused by increased demand, tight labor markets, and government stimulus, the current situation is attributed to a one-time impact from tariffs on prices. Mericle forecasts a 2% rise in consumer prices over the next 18 months due to these tariffs. The bank believes that this inflation shock is distinct from the pandemic-induced inflation and is likely to be temporary.
news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts a short-lived inflation surge driven by Trump's tariffs; PCE inflation may reach 3.6% by 2025.

news.summary: A new report titled "Electric Vehicle Charging Management Software Platform Market - A Global and Regional Analysis" has been recently released. The study covers the period of 2025-2034 and is available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report emphasizes the growth of the EV charging management software platform market, attributed to the rising demand for electric vehicles worldwide and governmental efforts aimed at promoting a clean environment. Key factors influencing this market growth include the surging interest in eco-friendly transportation options.
news.headline: Global EV charging management software platform market expected to grow from 2025-2034 due to increasing demand for electric vehicles and government support.

news.summary: Several public companies, including Tesla Inc. and Semler Scientific Inc., have quietly amassed billions in profits by holding Bitcoin. MicroStrategy Inc. is the standout with over 580,000 Bitcoins, seeing its investment grow from $40.6 billion to over $63 billion in value, earning more than $22 billion in unrealized profit. Tesla also made significant gains as a silent holder of Bitcoin. These companies attribute their success not just to the amount of Bitcoin they own, but also to getting in early and at a low price. MicroStrategy has now become a key player in the crypto space on Wall Street, with over 60% of its market value tied to Bitcoin. This trend highlights how companies are leveraging Bitcoin investments for substantial financial gains.
news.headline: Public companies like Tesla and Block Inc. profited billions from holding Bitcoin, with MicroStrategy leading, holding over 580,000 Bitcoins now valued at over $63 billion.

news.summary: Cemtrex, Inc. (NASDAQ: CETX), based in Hauppauge, NY, has successfully concluded a firm commitment underwritten public offering as of May 29, 2025. The advanced security technology and industrial services company raised around $1.25 million in gross proceeds from the offering, excluding underwriting fees and additional offering expenses. The offering, which closed on the same day, marks a significant step for the Company in terms of financial achievement.
news.headline: Cemtrex, Inc. closes $1.25M public offering on May 29, 2025, secured before expenses and underwriting fees deducted.

news.summary: Artemis Defense Institute in Orange County, California is set to host a two-day training event titled "Everyday Readiness: A Preventive Measure Workshop" on May 29, 2025. This initiative aims to empower individuals and assist businesses in complying with California's workplace violence prevention regulations. Attendees will benefit from comprehensive training spanning two days, focusing on practical strategies and measures to enhance readiness. By participating in this workshop, individuals can develop the necessary skills to ensure a safe and secure work environment.
news.headline: Artemis Defense Institute introduces "Everyday Readiness" workshop in Orange County to address safety concerns & SB 553 compliance for workplace violence prevention. Workshop aims to empower individuals & businesses to meet California's requirements.

news.summary: A pioneering AI platform focusing on enhancing health, fitness, and performance for athletes and individuals has been introduced by Maxiom Labs, Inc. (MAXIOM) from Palo Alto, California. The platform utilizes billions of data sets, reinforcement learning, and input from numerous users to ensure its optimization is based on highly regarded scientific research. Following extensive development, MAXIOM successfully garnered investment from DNAthlete, a genetics firm based in Switzerland. The exact amount of investment and the total funding secured by MAXIOM were not disclosed in the announcement.
news.headline: MAXIOM launches world's 1st Human-Centered AI Coach for Health & Performance, after securing investment from DNAthlete.

news.summary: Silexion has unveiled a groundbreaking RNAi technique showcasing impressive anti-tumor effects in three prevalent KRAS-driven cancer varieties. The inhibition rate reached approximately 90% in GP2D human colorectal cancer cells. The company plans to pursue further preclinical research targeting lung cancer cell lines to validate the efficacy of their approach.
news.headline: Silexion Therapeutics reports preclinical success with SIL204 in pancreatic, colorectal, and lung cancers, achieving ~90% inhibition rate in colorectal cells.

news.summary: After a successful rollout in the U.S., Inspira is fast-tracking the commercialization of its system. The Company is currently in talks with both governmental health departments and private organizations to expand its reach. This move comes as Inspira looks to capitalize on its clinical success, with numbers showing a rapid acceleration in adoption and interest.
news.headline: Inspira Technologies launches global commercial rollout of FDA-cleared ART100 System after success in U.S. implementations. Engaging with health depts. & private orgs.

news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report on Drone Airspace Security Systems has been introduced to ResearchAndMarkets.com's selection. The worldwide market for such systems was valued at US$1.7 billion in 2024 and is estimated to rise to US$5.7 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.6% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers a detailed examination of market trends, key drivers, and future projections, aiming to assist businesses in making well-informed decisions regarding these technologies.
news.headline: Global drone airspace security systems market valued at US$1.7B in 2024, projected to reach US$5.7B by 2030 with 22.6% CAGR.

news.summary: Shares of Build-A-Bear Workshop Inc. (NYSE: BBW) experienced a significant increase on Thursday following the release of impressive results for the first quarter of fiscal 2025. The company reported a revenue boost of 11.9% compared to the previous year, reaching $128.4 million, which exceeded analysts' expectations of $118.9 million. Adjusted earnings per share were $1.17, surpassing the consensus forecast of 87 cents. Net retail sales also saw a notable increase of 10.9%, totaling $119.6 million. E-commerce demand showed a slight uptick of 0.5%, while franchise and commercial revenue surged considerably by 28.3% to $8.8 million. Pre-tax income saw a substantial rise of 30.6% to $19.6 million, accounting for 15.3% of the revenue generated.
news.headline: Build-A-Bear beats expectations in Q1 fiscal 2025 with revenue up 11.9% to $128.4M, stock soars 25%.

news.summary: Shares of Kohl's Corporation (NYSE: KSS) surged over 21.5% at the beginning of Thursday's trading session. The company's first-quarter earnings per share showed a loss of 13 cents, surpassing the expected 37 cents loss by analysts. Quarterly sales stood at $3.23 billion, exceeding the projected $3.02 billion. Net sales dropped by 4.1%, with comparable sales also seeing a 3.9% decrease. The gross margin as a percentage of net sales saw an increase of 37 basis points, reaching 39.9%. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Kohl's beats Q1 estimates with strong margins, shares up over 21.5%. Reported EPS loss of 13 cents, sales $3.23 billion. Net sales decreased 4.1%, comparable sales down 3.9%. Gross margin 39.9%. Sephora expansion plans reiterated.

news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, FundingShield, a company specializing in compliance management, has recently welcomed Karthik Kumar to its Advisory Board. Kumar is a prominent figure in mortgage technology and digital innovation with a global reputation. With years of experience in mortgage lending, financial technology, and digital transformation, he excels in enhancing loan origination, fulfillment, and risk management processes through innovative solutions. Kumar's expertise in the industry is extensive, making him a valuable addition to FundingShield's team.
news.headline: Karthik Kumar joins FundingShield Advisory Board, known for expertise in mortgage tech, digital transformation.

news.summary: Hidden Road, the prime broker acquired by Ripple, has launched cryptocurrency swaps for institutional investors in the US. The service allows for cash-settled OTC swaps across major crypto assets. This follows Ripple's $1.25 billion acquisition deal in April. OTC swaps involve direct exchange of crypto assets. According to Hidden Road's CEO, OTC swaps are significant globally but previously unavailable to US institutions. In Jan 2024, Finery Markets reported a 106% jump in institutional OTC volumes. Hidden Road aims to capitalize on rising institutional demand, as Higgins notes convergence of traditional and digital finance ecosystems. The company received broker-dealer and MiCA licenses, illustrating its regulatory compliance. This move by Hidden Road aligns with broader trends of institutional interest in crypto assets.
news.headline: Hidden Road, acquired by Ripple, launches OTC crypto swaps in US, offering institutional clients multi-asset trading.
